languages.text: {n}Себериан потрясенно смотрит в одну точку, словно не имея сил противостоять обрушившемуся на него осознаванию. Огонек киберглаза едва заметно пульсирует, словно даже аугменты в его теле едва выносят свалившуюся на них нагрузку.{/n}

{n}Seberian stares ahead, dumbstruck, helpless to fend off the realisation crashing over him. The light of his cybernetic eye stutters, as though even his augmetics are breaking under the weight bearing down upon them.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан потрясенно смотрит в одну точку, словно не имея сил противостоять обрушившемуся на него осознаванию. Огонек киберглаза едва заметно пульсирует, словно даже аугменты в его теле едва выносят свалившуюся на них нагрузку.{/n}

languages.text: {n}シベリアンは呆然と、その衝撃を押し返すことができない。サイバーネティックな眼の光が、まるで増幅器がその重さに耐えられないかのように、ちらつく。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares ahead, dumbstruck, helpless to fend off the realisation crashing over him. The light of his cybernetic eye stutters, as though even his augmetics are crippling under the weight bearing down upon them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: シベリアは呆然と、その衝撃を押し返すことができない。サイバーネティックな眼の光が、まるで増幅器がその重さに耐えられないかのように、ちらつく。

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安呆望着前方，在骤然袭来的真相面前显得那样无力。他义眼里的光芒开始明灭闪烁，在这重压之下，仿佛连他体内的植入物都要随之瘫痪。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares ahead, dumbstruck, helpless to fend off the realisation crashing over him. The light of his cybernetic eye stutters, as though even his augmetics are breaking under the weight bearing down upon them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安呆望着前方，在骤然袭来的真相面前显得那样无力。他义眼里的光芒开始明灭闪烁，在这重压之下，仿佛连他体内的植入物都要随之瘫痪。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian mira adelante, atónito, impotente ante la comprensión que azota su mente. La luz de su ojo cibernético parpadea, como si incluso sus auméticos se rompieran bajo la presión de su psique.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares ahead, dumbstruck, helpless to fend off the realisation crashing over him. The light of his cybernetic eye stutters, as though even his augmetics are breaking under the weight bearing down upon them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian mira adelante, atónito, impotente ante la comprensión que azota su mente. La luz de su ojo cibernético parpadea, como si incluso sus auméticos se rompieran bajo la presión de su psique.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberians Blick ist starr, während er vergeblich versucht, die Erkenntnis abzuwehren, die ihn überkommt. Das Licht seines kybernetischen Auges flackert, als würden selbst seine Augmentationen unter der Last bersten, die an ihnen zerrt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares ahead, dumbstruck, helpless to fend off the realisation crashing over him. The light of his cybernetic eye stutters, as though even his augmetics are breaking under the weight bearing down upon them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberians Blick ist starr, während er vergeblich versucht, die Erkenntnis abzuwehren, die ihn überkommt. Das Licht seines kybernetischen Auges flackert, als würden selbst seine Augmentationen unter der Last bersten, die an ihnen zerrt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian regarde droit devant lui, ébahi et tétanisé par le choc de la réalité qu'il commence à entrevoir. La lumière de son œil cybernétique clignote, comme si même ses augmétiques se brisaient sous le poids écrasant de cette révélation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares ahead, dumbstruck, helpless to fend off the realisation crashing over him. The light of his cybernetic eye stutters, as though even his augmetics are breaking under the weight bearing down upon them.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian, üzerine çöken farkındalığı savuşturmaktan âciz bir şaşkınlık içinde ileriye bakıyor. Sibernetik gözünün ışığı, sanki ogmetikleri bile üzerlerine binen ağırlığın altında kırılıyormuş gibi titriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares ahead, dumbstruck, helpless to fend off the realisation crashing over him. The light of his cybernetic eye stutters, as though even his augmetics are breaking under the weight bearing down upon them.{/n}
